name: Mukhtar al-Thaqafi
title: Avenger of Karbala
shortDescription: A hero who was in Ibn Ziyad's prison during the event of Karbala and launched a great uprising years later to avenge the Master of Martyrs.
fullStory:
Mukhtar ibn Abi Ubayda al-Thaqafi was a smart, political, and brave man in Kufa. When Muslim ibn Aqeel came to Kufa, Mukhtar sheltered him in his house and was one of his main supporters.

After the defeat of Muslim's uprising, Ibn Ziyad arrested Mukhtar, injured his eye with a whip, and threw him into prison. Because of this, Mukhtar could not be present in Karbala on Ashura, and he was tormented by this.

After his release from prison, Mukhtar swore to avenge Imam Hussain's (AS) blood on his killers. He launched a great uprising in Kufa with the slogan 'Ya Latharat al-Hussain' (O avengers of Hussain).

He succeeded in killing many of the main perpetrators of Karbala (like Shimr, Umar Sa'd, Harmala, and Ibn Ziyad), bringing joy to the hearts of the Ahl al-Bayt (AS). Mukhtar was eventually martyred during a battle against Mus'ab ibn Zubayr in Kufa.
quote: (His uprising slogan:) O avengers of Hussain!
